case_title: LOWERY, DAVID VS CONTEMPORARY ART & GLASS INC. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOWERY, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONTEMPORARY ART & GLASS INC. $889.68 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $946.68, DEFENDANT'S EMPLOYEE HANDED THE PLAINTIFF A CASHIER'S CHECK FOR $800.00 TOWARDS THE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT BY #410845101, DATED 8/15/05. THE ORIGINAL JUDGMENT IS $1689.68 MINUS $800.00 PAID TO PLAINTIFF BY DEFENDANT ON 8/19/05. PLAINTIFF DISMISSED CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT DAVID BOUSKILA DUE TO NO SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,840.04 FILED BY LOWERY, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT CONTEMPORARY ART & GLASS INC. BOUSKILA, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CONTEMPORARY ART & GLASS INC.
